title: Mailchimp vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
h1: Mailchimp vs Constant Contact: Complete Comparison
intro: Both Mailchimp and Constant Contact are established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs and budgets. This comparison examines pricing, features, and overall performance to help you choose the right tool for your marketing strategy.

comparison_table.tool_b: Paid only (starting at $12/month, no free tier)

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, A/B testing, landing pages, analytics
comparison_table.tool_b: Event management, SMS, social media ads, e-commerce, list building tools

comparison_table.tool_a: Beginners and small businesses on a budget
comparison_table.tool_b: Nonprofits, local businesses, and e-commerce sellers

choose_a_if: You want to start for free and only pay when you grow beyond 500 subscribers
You're a beginner or small business looking for user-friendly automation and A/B testing
Cost-effectiveness and no long-term commitment are important to you
choose_b_if: You need built-in SMS marketing, event management, and social media ad integration
You run an e-commerce business requiring advanced list-building and transaction features
You serve nonprofits or local businesses and want dedicated support from day one

faq.q: Is Mailchimp better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Mailchimp excels for budget-conscious beginners with its free tier and strong automation features, earning higher ratings (4.3 vs 4.0 on G2). Constant Contact offers superior e-commerce, SMS, and event management features, making it better for businesses needing those capabilities.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Mailchimp is significantly cheaper for small businesses and startups, offering a free plan for up to 500 subscribers with no credit card required. Constant Contact has no free tier but starts at $12/month. If you exceed 500 subscribers, both platforms have comparable paid pricing around $12-13/month for entry-level plans.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, you can switch easily. Both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email templates. Mailchimp provides import tools to add your Constant Contact data, and the process typically takes just a few minutes. Plan the switch during a low-activity period to avoid disrupting campaigns.
